inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 cash from operations $764.8M minus capital spending $121.2M divided by ~278M diluted shares
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 mid-cycle owner cash; GAAP net income $415.7M depressed by amortization and one-time items vs adjusted net income $595.8M (adjusted diluted EPS $2.13)

bear.notes: Volume mean-reversion; listing fee pressure; slower Trayport/VettaFi growth

base.notes: Mid-cycle FCF growth on recurring GSIA and derivatives mix; exit ~20x cash flow

bull.notes: Sustained global energy/data growth plus Canadian equity activity; Cboe Australia integration

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Exchange intangible assets on balance sheet; no land/NAV misstatement pattern

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: AlphaX US ATS launch Jan 2025; ~$8M op ex + $11.5M capex in 2024 per 2024 annual MD&A; early-stage drag embedded in growth segments

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Deferred listing fees and GSIA recurring revenue (~$290M ARR trayport/VettaFi per Q1/26 MD&A); recognized over time in segment revenue

option_scan.question: Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: BOX stake consolidated; no holdco NAV discount pattern

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Operating croupier, not yield-curve royalty trust

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Trayport energy connectivity, VettaFi ETF indexing, private-markets expansion in TM2X strategy embedded in GSIA growth path

option_scan.question: Material options after scan?
option_scan.evidence: Lawrence full cash-flow path sufficient; growth initiatives in segment revenue, not separate NAV overlay

growth_explanation.mechanism: Recurring GSIA (Trayport, VettaFi, Datalinx) plus derivatives volumes and listing fee escalators on TSX/TSXV market cap
growth_explanation.source: FY2025 annual MD&A; Q1/26 MD&A segment revenue tables
